message:
feat(choreography): add end-to-end saga pipeline for participant code generation (bd-1f8jn.3)

Implement SagaPipeline that bridges the choreographic projection compiler
(bd-1f8jn.2) with the CALM-optimized saga executor to generate complete,
runnable Asupersync participant code from a single global protocol spec.

Pipeline stages:
  1. Validate & project global protocol to per-participant local types
  2. Convert choreographic interactions to SagaSteps via choreography_to_saga_plan()
  3. Apply CALM monotonicity batching via SagaExecutionPlan::from_plan()
  4. Render per-participant saga modules with Cx integration, EvidenceLedger,
     compensation handlers, and checkpoint/trace instrumentation
  5. Generate deterministic Lab test harness scaffolding

For each participant, the pipeline produces:
  - A SagaPlan with steps derived from protocol interactions
  - An async handler function with cx.checkpoint(), cx.trace(), compensation
    blocks, and evidence emission
  - Lab test setup creating session channels and spawning under deterministic
    runtime

New file: src/obligation/choreography/pipeline.rs (1581 lines)
Modified: src/obligation/choreography/mod.rs (pub mod pipeline declaration)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
